meta.goal: Implement Sandpack preview screenshot as course thumbnail with Supabase Storage upload

T1.title: Setup Supabase Storage bucket for course thumbnails
T1.description: Create migration to setup 'course-thumbnails' storage bucket with RLS policies allowing teachers to upload their own thumbnails

T2.title: Create thumbnail upload API endpoint
T2.description: Create POST /api/courses/thumbnail endpoint that accepts base64 image, uploads to Supabase Storage, returns public URL

T3.title: Implement screenshot capture utility
T3.description: Create utility function to capture screenshot from Sandpack preview iframe using html2canvas or native browser APIs, return base64 data URL

T4.title: Integrate screenshot capture into save flow
T4.description: Modify SaveDraftButton to: 1) capture screenshot from SandpackEditor preview, 2) upload via thumbnail API, 3) include thumbnail_url in course save payload

T5.title: Update courses API to accept thumbnail_url
T5.description: Modify POST /api/courses to accept optional thumbnail_url field and save to courses.thumbnail_url column

T6.title: Test end-to-end thumbnail flow
T6.description: Manual verification: create course, verify screenshot captured, uploaded to storage, URL saved to DB, thumbnail displays in course list

T1.summary: Created Supabase Storage bucket course-thumbnails with public read access and teacher upload RLS policies. Migration applied and PostgREST restarted.

T2.summary: Created POST /api/courses/thumbnail endpoint. Validates auth, accepts base64 data URL, uploads to course-thumbnails bucket, returns public URL. Includes size/MIME validation.

T3.summary: Created screenshot utility using html2canvas. Captures preview element, scales to 800x600, compresses to JPEG (0.8 quality), returns data URL. Installed html2canvas dependency.

T4.summary: Integrated screenshot capture into save flow. SandpackEditor exposes screenshot callback, SaveDraftButton captures/uploads thumbnail before save, graceful error handling. Build successful with no TypeScript errors.

T5.summary: Updated POST /api/courses to accept optional thumbnail_url field. Added to SaveCourseRequest interface and database insert. Backward compatible - thumbnails are optional.

T6.summary: Automated tests passed: Storage bucket verified, RLS policies active, DB schema correct, API endpoint responds, TypeScript compiles, dev servers running. Manual testing required by user.
